title: Saro's City Modpack
description: A pre-configured pack with everything you need to build a Minecraft city — roads, traffic lights, economy, ATMs, and server tools. Supports Forge, NeoForge, and Fabric for MC 1.20.1 and 1.21+
body:
![header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/SAROS_CITY_MODPACK/MP_SAROS_CITY_MODPACK_Header.webp)
![description](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/SAROS_CITY_MODPACK/MP_SAROS_CITY_MODPACK_Description.webp)

Saro's City bundles all of Saro's city mods into a single, pre-configured pack — no manual setup or version matching required. It covers modern city building, road networks and roleplay servers with a working economy.

[![Bisect Hosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/SAROS_CITY_MODPACK/MP_SAROS_CITY_MODPACK_Promo.webp)](https://server.sarocesch.de/refersaro.php)

![Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/SAROS_CITY_MODPACK/MP_SAROS_CITY_MODPACK_Features.webp)

**Included mods (also available individually):**

- **Roads** – [Saro's Road Signs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/saro-s-road-signs-mod) and [Saro's Road Blocks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/saro-s-road-blocks-mod). Intersections, highways and streets with custom paints and configurable traffic lights.
- **Economy** – [Saro's Money](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/saro-s-money-mod). Currency, bank accounts and ATMs for roleplay servers.
- **Interactive blocks** – [Saro's Interactive Blocks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/saro-s-interactive-blocks) for functional objects throughout the city.
- **Server tools** – [Saro's Essentials](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/saro-s-essentials). Core commands and management features for multiplayer.

All mods are pre-configured to run together. Suitable for singleplayer city builds and multiplayer roleplay servers.

![Discord](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/SAROS_CITY_MODPACK/MP_SAROS_CITY_MODPACK_Discord.webp)

Bug reports and suggestions: [Discord](https://discord.gg/H8a8CJe)

**Hosting:** BisectHosting (see banner) — use the promo code for a discount.

**Modpack usage:** Including these mods in other modpacks is allowed. Please credit this project with a link back to the page.

# More mods by Sarocesch: [all projects](https://www.curseforge.com/members/sarocesch/projects)
